response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performer as Momosuzu Nene from the hashtag in the video. 2. Identified the song title 'さよならメモリーズ' (Sayonara Memories) from the top-left text. 3. Used the search tool to find the lyrics for 'さよならメモリーズ supercell'. Found official lyrics in Japanese and corresponding English translations in the search results. 4. Created a single scene for the duration of the performance. 5. Formatted all data into the required JSON structure, ensuring lyrics and other metadata were correctly mapped and escaped.
response.global_summary: A complete vocal performance of the song 'Sayonara Memories' by Momosuzu Nene at her 2026 birthday live concert.

scenes.description: Momosuzu Nene performs the song 'Sayonara Memories'. She dances and sings on a stage decorated with cherry blossom imagery. The performance is continuous.
scenes.song_title: さよならメモリーズ (Sayonara Memories)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
桜が咲くよ
見慣れたいつもの坂道に
ああ別れを
泣いて笑ったあの日々
なんだか昨日のことのよう
この道はそう未来へ続く道
そんな気がしたの
例年より早い開花予想を
君は嬉しがってた
私は笑って「そうだね」って言った
あと少ししたらもうここには戻れないのに
言葉じゃうまく言えない想いを君に打ち明けるとしたらなんて
伝えよう最初で最後
いつか一緒に帰った道は私にとって特別な思い出
忘れないよさよならメモリーズ
春が来たらそれぞれの道を
また会える日を願って
さよなら小さくつぶやいた
空はあの日と変わらず青くてだからちょっと泣けた
わざと遠回りしたの
少しでも長く君の隣にいたくて
私はおどけて「まちがえた！」って言った
君は笑うその顔が眩しくて目をそらした
言葉じゃうまく言えない想いを胸に抱いてこの道を歩いた
覚えてるあの時君は
私の名前を呼んでくれた二人夕暮れの帰り道で
忘れないよさよならメモリーズ
出会えたこと感謝してる
初めて見た満開の桜
あれからどれくらい変われたんだろう
一目見た時に思ったんだこの人の事好きになりそうって
なんでかな？わかんないよ
それからの毎日はとても楽しくってだけど同じくらいに辛かったんだ
ごめんねなんかうまく言えないよだから私君となんていうか
今のままさよならしたくないの
友達のままじゃもう嫌なの
言おうと思ってた私君の君のことずっとずっと前から好きでした
ああやっと言えた
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The cherry blossoms are blooming
On the usual familiar slope
Ah, saying goodbye
Those days of crying and laughing
Seem like they were just yesterday
This road is, yes, a road that continues into the future
That's what I felt
You were happy about the early blooming forecast
I laughed and said "Yeah, it is"
Even though soon, we won't be able to return here
If I were to confess these feelings that I can't put into words well...
I'll tell you, for the first and last time
The road we once walked home together is a special memory to me
I won't forget you, Sayonara Memories
When spring comes, we'll go our separate ways
Wishing for the day we can meet again
I whispered "Goodbye" softly
The sky is blue just like that day, so I teared up a little
I took the long way home on purpose
Because I wanted to be by your side for just a little longer
I joked and said "I made a mistake!"
Your face when you laughed was so dazzling that I looked away
I walked down this road, holding these feelings I can't put into words well in my chest
Do you remember? At that time, you called my name
On the way home, just the two of us at dusk
I won't forget you, Sayonara Memories
I'm grateful that I met you
The first time I saw the cherry blossoms in full bloom
How much have I changed since then?
The moment I saw you, I thought, I'm going to fall in love with this person
Why, I wonder? I don't know
The days since then were so much fun, but they were just as painful
I'm sorry, I can't say it well
So, I... how should I say it...
I don't want to say goodbye just like this
I don't want to just be friends anymore
I've been thinking of saying it, I have, about you, I've loved you for a long, long time
Ah, I finally said it
